name: GOLFTEC Gaithersburg
about: GOLFTEC Gaithersburg is a high-tech golf training facility focused on data-driven instruction and practice. The center utilizes advanced technologies such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and club fitting services. It is designed for golfers seeking a structured improvement path through personalized lesson plans and technology-enabled practice sessions. The facility offers a professional environment for players of all levels, from beginners to seasoned golfers, with a primary emphasis on swing mechanics, on-course strategy, and club optimization.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
High-tech practice environment with real-time feedback
Comprehensive club fitting services with major brand options
Structured lesson plans for long-term improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, but a pro shop is available for gear purchases.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for lessons, practice, and fittings; exact model not specified but likely SkyTrak based on context.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, but you are welcome to use your own clubs. They also offer club rentals and sales.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed, but the facility has a pro shop for purchasing gear.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Simulator time is not explicitly detailed, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on usage and activity.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels.
